issues.title: OpenAI ResponseFormat handling is broken
issues.body:
The [response-format (json_schema)](https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference/chat/create#chat-create-response_format) is a relatively new OpenAI feature and we've been providing support for: [Spring AI Embraces OpenAI's Structured Outputs](https://spring.io/blog/2024/08/09/spring-ai-embraces-openais-structured-outputs-enhancing-json-response)

The regression is related to the the #1645 refactoring.
